title: Local Customer Reporting And Completion Evidence Admission Draft Export
objective: Add a browser-local customer reporting and completion evidence admission draft export that defines the later proof requirements for customer reports, completion evidence, PM/customer review, audit/readback, and downstream billing/payroll/accounting boundaries before any customer-facing report or completion evidence write path is admitted.
scope: Add an Export Customer Reporting Draft action to the existing Field Prep Outputs rail.

Download one JSON artifact that includes production tracking draft summary, proposed customer reporting and completion evidence packet, reporting readiness statuses, proposed packet sequence, authority boundary flags, and blocked write boundaries.
Keep the export local-only and informational.
Extend the focused Playwright smoke to prove the downloaded customer reporting admission draft artifact and zero mutation requests.
not_allowed: No Supabase, Render, Vercel, or Olares action.
No secret access or secret rotation.
No backend route or mutation route change.

No project import, workpackage rows, task rows, apparatus rows, field work authorization, assignment write, schedule/status write, durable field record write, production tracking write, customer reporting contract write, customer report write, customer completion evidence write, customer reporting mutation route, customer reporting audit write, customer reporting readback route, hosted customer reporting UI controls, billing export contract write, payroll export contract write, accounting record write, workbook macro, or workbook writeback.
No service, auth, DNS, ingress, or control-plane widening.

customer_reporting_admission_draft.note: This lane creates local admission-design context only. Customer reports, completion evidence, customer delivery, billing, payroll, and accounting outputs remain blocked until later admitted packets own those write paths.

validation_steps: rg -n "PM Lane 155|Export Customer Reporting Draft|customer-reporting-draft|pm_lane_155_local_customer_reporting_admission_draft_v1|mutationRequests\)\.toHaveLength\(0\)" PROJECT_STATUS.md docs/operations ops/agents apps/operations-web
validation_result: PASS - operations-web typecheck passed; operations-web build passed; focused Playwright pm import-intake smoke passed with the customer reporting draft download and mutationRequests=0; packet JSON parsed; PM Lane 155 guardrail rg passed; git diff --check passed.
sidecar_result: Read-only explorer Tesla confirmed PM Lane 155 should be customer reporting plus completion evidence, while billing/payroll/accounting remain split downstream. Desktop Codex NETA closeouts remain untracked and intentionally parked for a separate technical-authority review lane. They are not staged into PM Lane 155.
next_recommended_lane: Use this customer reporting and completion evidence admission draft as the no-write proof checklist for a later customer reporting packet. The next PM lane should either prepare a copy/paste executor packet for customer reporting admission design or continue to billing/payroll/accounting admission context while writes remain blocked.
